(अ), 琈दनांक 19 जनवरी, 2011 क琉 सं. का.आ. 105 (अ), 琈दनांक 28 जनवरी, 2012 क琉 सं. का.आ. 178 (अ), 琈दनांक 24 जनवरी, 2013 सं. का.आ. 273 (अ), 琈दनांक 30 जनवरी, 2014 सं. का.आ. 288 (अ) और 琈दनांक 22 जुलाई, 2014 सं. का.आ. 1880 (अ) 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कया गया था। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FORESTS AND CLIMATE CHANGE ORDER New Delhi, the 23rd February, 2015 S.O. 606 (E).— — — —In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the Order of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998, namely:— — — — In the said order, in the opening paragraph, for the words "for a period of sixteen years and nine months", the words "for a period upto 30th June, 2015" shall be substituted. [F. No. Q-18011/13/2000-CPA (Pt.)] Dr. RASHID HASAN, Advisor Note. - The Principal order was published in the Gazette of India vide No. S.O.93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998 and subsequently amended vide No. S.O. 68(E), dated the 25th January, 2000, No. S.O. 108(E), dated the 25th January, 2002, No. S.O. 99(E), dated the 28th January 2003, No. S.O. 396(E), dated the 3rd April, 2003, No. S.O. 94(E), dated the 25th January 2006, No. S.O. 1207(E), dated the 27th July, 2006, No. S.O. 679(E), dated the 27th April, 2007, No. S.O. 1219(E), dated the 26th July, 2007, No. S.O. 1720(E), dated the 18th July, 2008, No. S.O.1839(E), dated the 27th July, 2009, No. S.O.190(E), dated the 25th January, 2010, No. S.O.105(E), dated the 19th January 2011, No. S.O. 178(E), dated the 28th January, 2012, No. S.O. 273(E), dated the 24th January, 2013, No. S.O. 288(E), dated 30th January, 2014 and No. S.O. 1880(E) 22nd July, 2014.
